subject: FW: Please let Jeffrey know that:
body:
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 

________________________________

From: Boardman, Serena
[mailto:Serena.Boardman@SothebysInternationalRealty.com] 
Sent: Monday, September 24, 2007 1:16 AM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Please let Jeffrey know that:



The Krakoff house that burned on East 70th between Lexington and Park is
being put up for sale. I do not have information on the price yet. Width
is in excess of 26ft but probably less than 30ft. We should be able to
see it in October if it is of interest.

Serena Boardman
Senior Vice President
Sotheby's International Realty
38 East 61st Street
New York, New York 10021
212-606-7611 - Office
212-606-7661 - Fax
917-667-2468 - Mobile
serena.boardman@sothebysrealty.com
